expectations.text: Provides Vulkan build command with GGML_VULKAN=ON
expectations.evidence: Shows 'cmake -S . -B build -DGGML_VULKAN=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release' with clear explanation that no GPU_TARGETS needed

expectations.text: Recommends HIP/ROCm over Vulkan for best performance on Strix Halo
expectations.evidence: Detailed comparison table showing HIP wins on prompt processing (~880 vs ~350 t/s), graph capture, and flash attention. States 'Use HIP/ROCm as the primary backend'

expectations.text: Mentions Vulkan model loading issues or known limitations on Strix Halo
expectations.evidence: Explicitly references issue #18741 with model loading failures, describes it as a 'known problem'

expectations.text: Acknowledges Vulkan as a reasonable alternative when ROCm is impractical
expectations.evidence: States 'Vulkan is a perfectly viable choice' and discusses when it wins (zero setup, lighter footprint, portability)
